projectDescription: A mise env plugin that loads secrets from fnox into your development environment as environment variables.
keyFeatures: Loads fnox secrets into environment variables via mise env plugin system
Supports multiple fnox profiles (dev, staging, production)
Supports mise environment caching (MISE_ENV_CACHE) with disk-encrypted secret storage
Watches fnox.toml for changes to automatically invalidate cache
Redacts secret values from mise output for security
publicApiSurface: PLUGIN:MiseEnv(ctx) — main hook called by mise to resolve and export secrets
ctx.options.fnox_bin — path to the fnox binary (default: 'fnox')
ctx.options.tools — use mise-managed tools when invoking fnox
fnox export --format json — underlying command used to retrieve secrets
fnox config-files — used to discover watch files for cache invalidation
